import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/canvas/tokens'
params = {
    'clientId': 'fvtt_d3db244ce1d8af0b',
    'documentId': 'QURMNu3IQni6w1ZP'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.delete(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'a3cad2343dc06dec39d967c1a836d426c754e7edec533be2ce5a3e8139d0a67f'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
